text: UPI transaction failed and money got debited. What should I tell the customer?
Merchant says payment not received even though the user paid through UPI.
Customer says the refund still has not arrived after the order was cancelled.
Merchant says refund completed two days ago but the amount is not in the bank account.
Customer reports an unauthorized UPI payment from their account.
Customer says the wallet is restricted because KYC is pending.
KYC was submitted last week but the account is still blocked with no update.
User cannot set or reset the UPI PIN and wants next steps.
The bank account is not linking in the UPI app even after several tries.
Customer clicked a suspicious collect request and now says the transfer was not authorized.
